additiveDetail.hr: Fortificirano vinskim destilatom (77%); slatkoca iz zaustavljene fermentacije
additiveDetail.en: Fortified with grape spirit (77%); sweetness from arrested fermentation

cigarHint.hr: Srednja cigara, Habano ili blazi maduro
cigarHint.en: A medium cigar, Habano or a milder maduro

notes.hr: Tawny odležan 10 godina u drvu — orašasti plodovi, karamela, suho voće. Klasičan izbor uz cigaru srednje punoće.
notes.en: Tawny aged 10 years in wood — nuts, caramel, dried fruit. A classic pick with a medium-bodied cigar.

additiveDetail.hr: Fortificirano vinskim destilatom; slatkoca iz zaustavljene fermentacije
additiveDetail.en: Fortified with grape spirit; sweetness from arrested fermentation

cigarHint.en: A medium-to-full cigar, maduro or Habano

notes.hr: Dublja, koncentriranija verzija — pečeni orasi, datulje, fina oksidativna kompleksnost. Jedan od najboljih univerzalnih partnera cigari.
notes.en: Deeper and more concentrated — roasted nuts, dates, fine oxidative complexity. One of the best all-round cigar partners.

additiveDetail.hr: Fortificirano vinskim destilatom; slatkoca iz zaustavljene fermentacije
additiveDetail.en: Fortified with grape spirit; sweetness from arrested fermentation

cigarHint.en: A medium-to-full cigar, maduro or Habano

notes.hr: Zreo tawny — badem, karamela, suha smokva; svilenkasta tekstura.
notes.en: Mature tawny — almond, caramel, dried fig; silky texture.

additiveDetail.hr: Fortificirano vinskim destilatom; slatkoca iz zaustavljene fermentacije
additiveDetail.en: Fortified with grape spirit; sweetness from arrested fermentation

cigarHint.en: A full maduro cigar — a classic

notes.hr: LBV — vintage karakter po pristupačnoj cijeni: tamna višnja, kupina, kakao. Odličan omjer cijene i kvalitete uz maduro cigare.
notes.en: LBV — vintage character at an accessible price: dark cherry, blackberry, cocoa. Great value with maduro cigars.

additiveDetail.hr: Fortificirano vinskim destilatom; slatkoca iz zaustavljene fermentacije
additiveDetail.en: Fortified with grape spirit; sweetness from arrested fermentation

notes.hr: Bogati reserve ruby — sočno tamno voće i čokolada; pouzdan svakodnevni porto uz cigaru.
notes.en: Rich reserve ruby — juicy dark fruit and chocolate; a dependable everyday port with a cigar.

additiveDetail.hr: Fortificirano vinskim destilatom; slatkoca iz zaustavljene fermentacije
additiveDetail.en: Fortified with grape spirit; sweetness from arrested fermentation

notes.hr: Ruby iz grožđa vintage razreda — šljiva, višnja, čokolada; pun i sladak.
notes.en: Ruby from vintage-class grapes — plum, cherry, chocolate; full and sweet.

additiveDetail.hr: Fortificirano vinskim destilatom; slatkoca iz zaustavljene fermentacije
additiveDetail.en: Fortified with grape spirit; sweetness from arrested fermentation

notes.hr: Vrh piramide porta — deklarirana godišta, dekantiranje obavezno. Uz punu cigaru spada među povijesno najslavnije kombinacije.
notes.en: The top of the port pyramid — declared vintages, decanting required. With a full cigar it is one of the most storied pairings.

additiveDetail.en: Fortified with grape spirit; fully dry

notes.hr: Suhi fino pod florom — slan, mineralan, badem. Osvježavajući kontrast blagoj cigari.
notes.en: Dry fino aged under flor — saline, mineral, almond. A refreshing contrast to a mild cigar.

notes.hr: Amontillado — lješnjak, duhan, suho drvo; suh i kompleksan. Podcijenjen partner cigari srednje punoće.
notes.en: Amontillado — hazelnut, tobacco, dry wood; dry and complex. An underrated partner for a medium cigar.

notes.hr: Oksidativni oloroso — orah, koža, balzamiko; suh, pun i dug. Nosi i punu cigaru.
notes.en: Oxidative oloroso — walnut, leather, balsamic; dry, full and long. Stands up to a full cigar.

notes.hr: PX — grožđice, datulje, kava; gust poput sirupa. Desertni ekstrem koji presijeca i najtamniji dim.
notes.en: PX — raisins, dates, coffee; syrup-thick. A dessert extreme that cuts through the darkest smoke.

additiveDetail.hr: Fortificirano vinskim destilatom; slatkoca ovisi o sorti (Bual/Malmsey)
additiveDetail.en: Fortified with grape spirit; sweetness depends on the variety (Bual/Malmsey)

notes.hr: Madeira — karamela, orah i marelica s visokom kiselinom koja čisti nepce između dimova.
notes.en: Madeira — caramel, walnut and apricot with high acidity that cleans the palate between puffs.

additiveDetail.hr: Prirodna slatkoca iz prosusenog grozdja (passito), bez fortifikacije
additiveDetail.en: Natural sweetness from dried grapes (passito), no fortification

notes.hr: Dalmatinski desertni klasik od prosušenog grožđa — suha smokva, med, karamela. Domaći odgovor na porto uz cigaru.
notes.en: The Dalmatian dessert classic from dried grapes — dried fig, honey, caramel. Croatia's answer to port with a cigar.

notes.hr: Vrhunski plavac s položaja Dingač — zrela višnja, suha šljiva, mediteranske trave; pun, topao, taninski. Ponos Pelješca.
notes.en: Top plavac from the Dingač slope — ripe cherry, dried plum, Mediterranean herbs; full, warm, tannic. The pride of Pelješac.

notes.hr: Dalmatinski standard — tamno voće, začini, mediteranski karakter; pouzdan svakodnevni partner cigari.
notes.en: The Dalmatian standard — dark fruit, spice, Mediterranean character; a reliable everyday cigar partner.

notes.hr: Drugi veliki pelješki položaj — nešto mekši od Dingača, zrelo tamno voće i suha šljiva.
notes.en: Pelješac's other great site — slightly softer than Dingač, ripe dark fruit and dried plum.

notes.hr: Babić s kamenjara — tamno voće, kamen, suha trava; ozbiljna struktura i svježina.
notes.en: Babić from the stone fields — dark fruit, stone, dried herbs; serious structure and freshness.

notes.hr: Istarski teran ozbiljnog izdanja — divlja kupina, željezo, zemlja; markantna kiselina.
notes.en: A serious Istrian teran — wild blackberry, iron, earth; striking acidity.

cigarHint.en: The fullest cigars — carries even an oscuro

notes.hr: Od prosušenog grožđa — suha višnja, čokolada, začini; baršunasto i moćno (15%+). Među najboljim suhim vinima uz punu cigaru.
notes.en: From dried grapes — dried cherry, chocolate, spice; velvety and powerful (15%+). Among the best dry wines for a full cigar.

notes.hr: 'Mali Amarone' — višnja i suho voće s mekim taninima; pristupačniji ulaz u stil.
notes.en: The 'baby Amarone' — cherry and dried fruit with soft tannins; an accessible entry to the style.

notes.hr: Nebbiolo — ruža, katran, višnja, koža; visoki tanini i kiselina traže cigaru s karakterom.
notes.en: Nebbiolo — rose, tar, cherry, leather; high tannin and acidity call for a cigar with character.

notes.hr: Sangiovese u najozbiljnijem izdanju — višnja, koža, duhan; elegancija i snaga u ravnoteži.
notes.en: Sangiovese at its most serious — cherry, leather, tobacco; elegance and power in balance.

notes.hr: Dugo odležan tempranillo — suha šljiva, vanilija od američkog hrasta, koža. Mekan, zreo, cigar-friendly klasik.
notes.en: Long-aged tempranillo — dried plum, American-oak vanilla, leather. Soft, mature, a cigar-friendly classic.

additiveDetail.hr: Standardno vinarstvo (sulfiti); zaostali secer daje mekocu
additiveDetail.en: Standard winemaking (sulphites); residual sugar lends softness

cigarHint.en: A full maduro cigar — a sweet contrast

notes.hr: Sa 60-godišnjih trsova — džem od šljive, vanilija, kakao; polusuho bogatstvo koje odlično ide uz maduro.
notes.en: From 60-year-old vines — plum jam, vanilla, cocoa; off-dry richness that loves a maduro.

notes.hr: Izvorni zinfandel — hrvatski original: kupina, papar, toplo mediteransko voće.
notes.en: The original zinfandel — a Croatian original: blackberry, pepper, warm Mediterranean fruit.

cigarHint.en: A full cigar with cedar notes

notes.hr: Crni ribiz, cedrovina, duhan — sorta čije drvne note prirodno prate cigaru.
notes.en: Blackcurrant, cedar, tobacco — a variety whose woody notes naturally echo a cigar.

notes.hr: Sočna kupina i šljiva s čokoladnim finišem — mekani tanini, vrlo pristupačan stil.
notes.en: Juicy blackberry and plum with a chocolate finish — soft tannins, a very approachable style.

notes.hr: Crni papar, kupina, dim — začinski profil koji se nadovezuje na začinsku cigaru.
notes.en: Black pepper, blackberry, smoke — a spicy profile that plays off a spicy cigar.

notes.hr: Zreo, džemast stil s toplim začinima — bogatstvo koje prati tamne dimove.
notes.en: Ripe, jammy style with warm spice — richness that follows dark smoke.

notes.hr: Grenache blend s juga Rhone — garrigue, zrela šljiva, koža; toplina i dubina.
notes.en: A southern Rhône grenache blend — garrigue, ripe plum, leather; warmth and depth.

notes.hr: Sangiovese — višnja, koža, suha trava; kiselina drži nepce svježim.
notes.en: Sangiovese — cherry, leather, dried herbs; acidity keeps the palate fresh.

notes.hr: Malina, jagoda, šumsko tlo — delikatan; traži blagu cigaru da ga ne pregazi.
notes.en: Raspberry, strawberry, forest floor — delicate; needs a mild cigar so it isn't overpowered.

notes.hr: Mekan, okrugao, šljiva i kakao — pristupačan crni za opuštenu kombinaciju.
notes.en: Soft, round, plum and cocoa — an approachable red for a relaxed pairing.

notes.hr: Svježa višnja i papar; lagana i pitka — uz blagu jutarnju cigaru.
notes.en: Fresh cherry and pepper; light and drinkable — for a mild morning cigar.

notes.hr: Hrvatski bijeli standard — jabuka, citrus, cvijet; čist i svjež.
notes.en: Croatia's white standard — apple, citrus, blossom; clean and fresh.

notes.hr: Puniji dalmatinski bijeli — zrela kruška, med, slana mineralnost.
notes.en: A fuller Dalmatian white — ripe pear, honey, saline minerality.

notes.hr: Istarska klasika — bijela breskva, bagrem, lagana gorčina badema na kraju.
notes.en: The Istrian classic — white peach, acacia, a light almond bitterness on the finish.

notes.hr: Maslac, vanilija, pečena jabuka — kremasta tekstura lijepo prati kremasti dim Connecticuta.
notes.en: Butter, vanilla, baked apple — a creamy texture that mirrors Connecticut's creamy smoke.

notes.hr: Limeta, zelena jabuka, škriljevac uz nježnu prirodnu slatkoću i nizak alkohol.
notes.en: Lime, green apple, slate with gentle natural sweetness and low alcohol.

additiveDetail.hr: Standardno vinarstvo (sulfiti); dozaza secera u brut razini (<12 g/L)
additiveDetail.en: Standard winemaking (sulphites); sugar dosage at brut level (<12 g/L)

notes.hr: Brioche, citrus, fine perlice — mjehurići čiste nepce; tradicija uz blagu jutarnju cigaru.
notes.en: Brioche, citrus, fine bubbles — the mousse cleanses the palate; a tradition with a mild daytime cigar.

name: Valdobbiadene Prosecco Superiore DOCG (Valdo / Villa Sandi)

notes.hr: Ulazna DOCG razina s brežuljaka Valdobbiadenea — kruška, cvijet, lagane perlice; pouzdan aperitiv uz najblaže cigare.
notes.en: Entry DOCG level from the Valdobbiadene hills — pear, blossom, light bubbles; a dependable aperitif with the mildest cigars.

cigarHint.en: A medium-to-full cigar, a maduro contrast

notes.hr: Botritis klasik — med, marelica, šafran; raskošna slatkoća s električnom kiselinom.
notes.en: The botrytis classic — honey, apricot, saffron; opulent sweetness with electric acidity.

notes.hr: Gušći i bogatiji od 5 puttonyosa — med, datule, naranča, šafran; dugi završetak.
notes.en: Thicker and richer than 5 puttonyos — honey, dates, orange, saffron; long finish.

notes.hr: Najlakša aszu kategorija — cvjetna, svježa, s umjerenom slatkoćom i živom kiselinom.
notes.en: The lightest aszú category — floral, fresh, with moderate sweetness and lively acidity.

additiveDetail.hr: Čisti sok botritiziranog groždja, bez dodanog šećera
additiveDetail.en: Pure free-run juice of botrytised grapes, no added sugar

cigarHint.en: Mild-medium — essencia dominates, the cigar follows

notes.hr: Najrjeđe i najskuplje vino Tokaja — sirupasta konzistencija, 450+ g/L šećera. Med, ružina latice, suho voće.
notes.en: The rarest and most precious Tokaj wine — syrupy texture, 450+ g/L sugar. Honey, rose petals, dried fruit.

additiveDetail.hr: Prirodna slatkoca iz mješavine botritiziranog i zdravog groždja
additiveDetail.en: Natural sweetness from a mix of botrytised and healthy grapes

notes.hr: Pristupačniji od aszúa — grozdje se bere neovisno o botritisu, mješavina daje karakter.
notes.en: More approachable than aszú — grapes harvested regardless of botrytis, the blend gives character.

cigarHint.hr: Lagana, Connecticut shade — svježe i mineralno
cigarHint.en: Mild, Connecticut Shade — fresh and mineral

notes.hr: Suhi furmint iz Tokaja — vulkanska mineralnost, jabuka, limun, bijeli cvijet. Odličan aperitiv.
notes.en: Dry Furmint from Tokaj — volcanic minerality, apple, lemon, white blossom. Excellent as an aperitif.

notes.hr: Med, kandirana naranča, vanilija — bogata slatkoća uz dovoljno svježine.
notes.en: Honey, candied orange, vanilla — rich sweetness with enough freshness.

notes.hr: Istarski aromatski dragulj — ruža, med, muškatni orah; slatko ali živo.
notes.en: An Istrian aromatic gem — rose, honey, nutmeg; sweet but lively.

notes.hr: Najrasireniji prosecco u HR trgovinama — jednostavan, voćan, svjež; ulaz u kategoriju.
notes.en: The most widely available prosecco in Croatian stores — simple, fruity, fresh; the category entry point.

notes.hr: Referentna kuća Valdobbiadenea — zrela jabuka, glicinija, fina perlica; prosecco koji se ozbiljno shvaća.
notes.en: The benchmark Valdobbiadene house — ripe apple, wisteria, fine mousse; prosecco taken seriously.

notes.hr: Prepoznatljiva zlatna boca; korektan brut voćnog profila — dio cijene je ambalaža, navodimo radi informacije.
notes.en: The recognizable gold bottle; a decent fruity brut — part of the price is the packaging, noted for information.

name: Valdobbiadene Superiore di Cartizze DOCG (Villa Sandi / Bisol)

notes.hr: Vrh prosecco piramide — grand cru brežuljak Cartizze: kremasta perlica, breskva, med. Najozbiljniji izraz sorte glera.
notes.en: The top of the prosecco pyramid — the Cartizze grand cru hill: creamy mousse, peach, honey. Glera at its most serious.

name: Franciacorta Ca' del Bosco Cuvée Prestige

additiveDetail.hr: Standardno vinarstvo (sulfiti); klasicna metoda, brut dozaza
additiveDetail.en: Standard winemaking (sulphites); classic method, brut dosage

notes.hr: Talijanski odgovor šampanjcu — klasična metoda, brioche i lješnjak; ozbiljna alternativa uz blagu cigaru.
notes.en: Italy's answer to Champagne — classic method, brioche and hazelnut; a serious option with a mild cigar.

name: Cava Brut Nature Reserva (Juvé & Camps / Gramona)

notes.hr: Klasična metoda bez dozaže — suh, zreo, orašast; najbolji omjer cijene i ozbiljnosti među pjenušcima.
notes.en: Classic method with no dosage — dry, mature, nutty; the best value-to-seriousness ratio in sparkling.

notes.hr: Plešivički pionir klasične metode; Amfora verzija fermentira u amforama — hrvatski pjenušac svjetske razine.
notes.en: The Plešivica pioneer of the classic method; the Amfora version ferments in clay — a world-class Croatian sparkling.

notes.hr: Prvi hrvatski pjenušac klasičnom metodom (Višnjan) — svjež, citrusni brut; Prestige odležava 18+ mjeseci na kvascima.
notes.en: Croatia's first classic-method sparkling (Višnjan) — a fresh, citrusy brut; Prestige spends 18+ months on lees.
